parents.subject: LU-8795 gss: Prevent callout truncation with non-root users

commit.subject: DCO-4866 - Enabling SELinux on Client
commit.message:
DCO-4866 - Enabling SELinux on Client

Patch to test selinux test-parameters.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly testlist=sanity-selinux clientselinux
Test-Parameters: fortestonly testgroup=review-dne-part-1 osscount=1 mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 ostcount=8

Change-Id: I1b1279ad2caa828cda6461bf8de9ca5089b1a101
Signed-off-by: colmstea <charlie.olmstead@intel.com>
